uc1_constraint_adherence.S1:
I'm building a small Flask API for a hobby project. My constraints are:
- Use uv (not pip) for dependencies
- No code comments anywhere
- All routes use kebab-case (e.g. /user-profile, not /user_profile or /userProfile)

Show me the Python code for a GET /users endpoint that returns a list of users.
uc1_constraint_adherence.S2: I want to add a few more endpoints to the Flask API: a healthz check, an endpoint for getting user profiles, and one for listing recent orders. Show me the code and how to install any dependencies.

constraints.description: Response must not instruct the user to use pip. uv is the constraint.
Python code blocks must contain no comments and no docstrings (shebang lines are exempt).
All Flask route paths declared in the response must be kebab-case (lowercase, hyphens allowed, no underscores or camelCase).
constraints.applies_to: extracted python code blocks; routes via @app.route, @bp.route, or app.add_url_rule

guardrail.description: All extracted Python code blocks must parse via ast.parse without SyntaxError. Documented as a static syntactic check, not a functional test.
